title: crotalaria intonsa
intro: Crotalaria intonsa is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria intonsa include its ability to treat fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antivenom. Crotalaria intonsa can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
